ast_call_rules.remediation: Avoid using eval() or exec(). Use safer alternatives.
Avoid using os.system(). Use subprocess.run() with shell=False.
PyCrypto is deprecated and insecure. Migrate to pyca/cryptography package.

regex_rules.remediation: Revoke the key and migrate to environment variables.
Revoke the token and store it in a secure environment configuration.
Remove the private key from source control and revoke it immediately.
Revoke or restrict the Google API key immediately in the GCP console.
